author: nflaig
content: https://dora.glamsterdam-devnet-5.ethpandaops.io/slot/132837#ptcVotes, dora is a bit confusing here, it says 192% because aggregate bits set is > committee size but this is expected in a network with low validator count, I think we should always use `PTC_SIZE` and not committee size, clients need to properly set bits in the aggregate for duplicate validators cc <@808969530608451584>
